description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a low-pitched gable roof covered in dark gray material. The exterior is clad in light wood paneling, accented by a band of yellow trim along the roofline. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A covered porch area is visible on one side, partially enclosed with vertical slats and a small set of steps leading up to it. The structure sits on a flat, paved base, suggesting integration with an urban or suburban environment. A chimney and several roof vents are present, indicating functional residential amenities.
description: A modern, light wood bungalow with a low-pitched gable roof, asymmetrical windows, and a covered porch area, set on a paved base.
description_view_0: The main facade shows the covered porch with vertical slats, large windows, and the main entrance area.
description_view_1: The gable end is visible, showing a simpler facade with two small windows and the roof's full pitch.
description_view_2: The opposite long side reveals more windows, a secondary entrance, and the continuation of the yellow roof trim.
description_view_3: The rear gable end displays a mix of window sizes and the back portion of the porch, with the roof's slope prominent.
